'''ân-s-f-l''' ('''kanasfeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tellurize|tellurize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-s-f-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tellurize|tellurize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-s-f-l
|-
! Lemma
| kanasfeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinasfeloko|thinasfeloko]] || [[word:jinasfeloko|jinasfeloko]] || [[word:shinasfeloko|shinasfeloko]] || [[word:kinasfeloko|kinasfeloko]]
|-
